raw.subject: Your Owensboro page caught my eye, Panda Foot & Spa.
raw.body:
Hi,

Your Owensboro page caught my eye, Panda Foot & Spa. The tranquility of your spa really shines through in the photos you share. It's clear you've worked hard to create a serene atmosphere for your clients.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be making it harder for new customers to find and book your amazing massage treatments. As a local business, having a simple website can help bring in more bookings and grow your client base.

I sketched up a page idea from what you post on Facebook, featuring a services menu, a work gallery, and a prominent booking call-to-action. You can see it here:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/panda-foot-spa-owensboro

If you're interested in turning this idea into a real website, I'd be happy to discuss the details and provide a quote. Let me know if you'd like to schedule a quick call to chat more about it.
